nasb.text: For the earth will be filled With the knowledge of the glory of the Lord, As the waters cover the sea.

esv.text: For the earth will be filled with the knowledge of the glory of the Lord as the waters cover the sea.

cnv.text: 認識耶和華之榮耀的知識，必充滿全地，好像眾水遮蓋海洋一樣。

ccb.text: 大地必充满对耶和华之荣耀的认识， 就像海洋充满了水一样。
